headline: Is This the Right Time to Add Globus Medical Stock to Your Portfolio?
summary: GMED rides on NuVasive synergies, strong cash flow and rapid innovation, but macro pressures and rising costs cloud its near-term outlook.

headline: Thermo Fisher Stock May Benefit Following Collaboration With PRECISE
summary: TMO teams up with PRECISE on a major proteomics study, expanding its role in large biobank projects and precision medicine initiatives.

headline: NEOG Q3 Earnings & Revenues Top, Gross Margin Down, Stock Crashes
summary: Neogen beats Q3 earnings and revenue estimates, but margins slump and stock drops nearly 3% after results.
